title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
company: Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Bengaluru operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners:
Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Schneider Electric India South Asia Partners!
